info.title: Locking Information
info.description: Record Locking Information APIs allows you to lock records, unlock records, view locking information of locked records and edit locking information of locked records.

get.summary: To retrieve the locking information details of locked records
get.description: Use the Get Record Locking Information API to retrieve the locking information details of locked records in different modules.

200.description: To retrieve the locking information details of locked records.

schema.description: A JSON object containing the locking information details of locked records.

data.description: An array of objects containing the locking information details of locked records.

items.description: An object containing the locking information details of a locked record.

Locked_By__s.description: An object containing the details of the user who locked the record.

name.description: The name of the user who locked the record.

id.description: The ID of the user who locked the record.

module.description: The module of the user who locked the record.

Locked_For__s.description: An object containing the details of the record that is locked.

module.description: An object containing the details of the module of the locked record.

api_name.description: The API name of the module of the locked record.

id.description: The ID of the module of the locked record.

name.description: The name of the locked record.

id.description: The ID of the locked record.

$field_states.description: The field states of the locked record. Can be null when no field state is present.

anyOf.description: The field states of the locked record.

Locked_Reason__s.description: The reason for locking the record.

$editable.description: Indicates whether the locked record is editable.

$sharing_permission.description: The sharing permission of the locked record.

Locked_Time__s.description: The time when the record was locked.

Record_Locking_Configuration_Id__s.description: The ID of the record locking configuration.

Record_Locking_Rule_Id__s.description: The ID of the record locking rule.

id.description: The ID of the locking information record.

Feature_Type__s.description: The feature type of the locking information.

$zia_visions.description: Zia Visions related information. Can be null when not present.

anyOf.description: No Zia Visions information is present.

info.description: An object containing the pagination details.

per_page.description: The number of records per page.

more_records.description: Indicates if there are more records available.

post.summary: To lock a record of a module
post.description: Use the Lock Record API to lock records in different modules.

data.description: An array containing the reason for locking the record.

items.description: An object containing the reason for locking the record.

put.summary: To update the locking reason of a locked record

parameters.description: The API name of the module to which the record belongs.

parameters.description: The unique identifier of the record whose locking reason needs to be updated.

delete.description: Use the Remove Lock from Locked Records API to remove locks from locked records in different modules.

parameters.name: moduleName
parameters.description: The API name of the module to which the locked record belongs.

parameters.name: recordId
parameters.description: The ID of the locked record from which the lock is to be removed.

200.description: To remove lock from locked records.

data.description: responses for removing lock from locked records.

items.description: Details of the remove lock operation.

status.description: Indicates that the request was successful.

code.description: Indicates that the lock removal was successful.

message.description: Message indicating the result of the lock removal operation.
